name: 黑渦傳說破艦島
mnemonic: B1 Sjofn 索芙恩：Hydroball 水球 + 點名直線。
B2 Halicarnassus 哈里卡納索斯：紙牌變換 + 圖形機制。
B3 Diabolic Hydra 惡魔海德拉：多頭龍機制 + 召喚 add。
notes: HW 3.1 hard 版破艦島（Lv 60）。Boss 依序為 Sjofn 索芙恩、Halicarnassus 哈里卡納索斯、Diabolic Hydra 惡魔海德拉。重點：依各 boss 機制走位、add 速秒、tankbuster 與 raidwide 配合減傷與團補。

mechanics.description: Tankbuster。；對 MT 釋放高傷害單體 buster，MT 開大減傷接傷，雙 T swap 接力。
mechanics.name: Tankbuster 坦克爆擊

mechanics.description: AoE 全屏 : 全屏範圍 AoE 攻擊，全員預備減傷與大團補。
mechanics.name: AoE 全屏

bosses.name: 索芙恩
mnemonic: Sjofn 索芙恩 機制：Hydroball 水球 + 點名直線。

mechanics.description: - deals a room-wide AoE, followed by a lightning tether between two players. Move away from each other to break the tether.；全屏範圍 AoE 攻擊，全員預備減傷與大團補。
mechanics.name: Blanket Thunder 毯雷

mechanics.description: - players will be marked with a red flag. If this happens, move into the slime to become fettered and also immune to the lightning.；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Megavolt 巨型雷擊

mechanics.description: - makes the arena slippery for a few seconds, then marks players with an ice flag and a circle. Each marker will drop an Iceberg at the spot where it；場上範圍 AoE 預警，看圖示提前走位避開預兆範圍。
mechanics.name: Flash Freeze

bosses.name: 哈里卡納索斯
mnemonic: Halicarnassus 哈里卡納索斯 機制：紙牌變換 + 圖形機制。

mechanics.description: - room-wide AoE.；全屏範圍 AoE 攻擊，全員預備減傷與大團補。
mechanics.name: Maelstrike 擊

mechanics.description: - fire puddles will appear on the ground, and then explode.；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Ghomoro Splitter

mechanics.description: - All players will be inflicted with an un-Esunable poison Poison, and then several chests will appear. Chests containing a blue potion will cure one；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Poison Mist 毒

mechanics.description: - high-damaging room-wide AoE.；全屏範圍 AoE 攻擊，全員預備減傷與大團補。
mechanics.name: Bullet Hell 彈幕地獄

mechanics.description: - A player is marked with a crosshair and inflicted with a severe heavy Heavy before the boss targets them with a high-damage AoE.；場上範圍 AoE 預警，看圖示提前走位避開預兆範圍。
mechanics.name: Grenado Shot 射

mechanics.description: - The boss will spawn these around the arena, and then begin targeting them. After a few seconds, a targeted keg will explode, causing massive damage；依預兆走位處理。
mechanics.name: Firesand Kegs 火

bosses.name: 惡魔海德拉
mnemonic: Diabolic Hydra 惡魔海德拉 機制：多頭龍機制 + 召喚 add。

mechanics.description: Tankbuster。；對 MT 釋放高傷害單體 buster，MT 開大減傷接傷，雙 T swap 接力。
mechanics.name: Tankbuster 坦克爆擊

mechanics.description: AoE 全屏 : 全屏範圍 AoE 攻擊，全員預備減傷與大團補。
mechanics.name: AoE 全屏

bosses.name: Battle Coeurl
mnemonic: Tankbuster 坦克爆擊 → MT 開減傷
AoE 全屏 → 全員減傷

mechanics.description: Tankbuster。；對 MT 釋放高傷害單體 buster，MT 開大減傷接傷，雙 T swap 接力。
mechanics.name: Tankbuster 坦克爆擊

mechanics.description: AoE 全屏 : 全屏範圍 AoE 攻擊，全員預備減傷與大團補。
mechanics.name: AoE 全屏

bosses.name: Ymir
mnemonic: Tankbuster 坦克爆擊 → MT 開減傷
AoE 全屏 → 全員減傷
